_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for tax domain analysis and extraction.

scaffolds.name: Tax Return Summary
steps: Identify return type, tax period, and issuing authority
Extract taxpayer identifiers with redaction safeguards
Extract taxable income, deductions, credits, and net liability
Check filing status and receipt/protocol references
Cite exact section and table for each critical claim
Mark missing critical fields as unverified without inference

scaffolds.name: Tax Payment Reconciliation
steps: Identify amount assessed versus amount paid
Extract payment reference, channel, and settlement date
Compute residual balance, penalty, and interest where documented
Validate currency and period alignment
Flag mismatch between notice and payment slip
Report unresolved gaps with citations

scaffolds.name: Assessment Notice Review
steps: Locate notice id, issue date, and legal basis
Extract assessed base, rate, penalties, and due date
Identify objection window and procedural instructions
Cross-check referenced annexes and footnotes
Surface ambiguities and missing fields
Present document-grounded next actions without legal/tax advice

scaffolds.name: Property Tax Bill Analysis
steps: Extract property identifier, assessed value, and jurisdiction
Extract principal tax, fees, penalties, and installment options
Compare current versus prior period values when available
Verify payment instructions and due dates
Highlight disputed or missing valuation components
Cite annex references where valuation methodology is defined
